title: Dynamic Boba
description: A mod adding versatile boba tea, with several flavors having their own unique effects.
body:
# Dynamic Boba:

### A mod about boba tea, and unique positive effects you can get from it.


## INFO:

<details>
<summary>Boba Types & Effects</summary>
  
### Ochre - Vigor:
- Slight lifesteal effect
- _-1 Maximum health_

### Fuchsia - Adrenaline:
- +25% Movement speed
- 2.2x Mining speed
- +0.2 Attack speed
- _+25% Damage recieved_

### Umber - Fortified:
- One-tap immunity while over 30% health
- +2 Knockback resistance
- +25% Damage reduction
- _-20% Movement speed_

### Ivory - Refreshed:
- Subtle, consistant health regen
</details>
